title: Codereview pass 2: WINDOW_SIZE constant shadowed and inconsistent
description:
In lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs, the replay window functions use inconsistent references to window size:

1. Line 61: pub const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32; (module-level)
2. Line 343: const WINDOW_SIZE: u32 = 32; (local in is_replay_candidate, shadows module-level)
3. Line 377: if shift >= 32 { (hardcoded literal in update_replay_window)

All three should reference the single module-level constant. Current code works but is a maintenance hazard - changing the module constant won't affect the others.

Fix: Remove the local const on line 343, use WINDOW_SIZE on line 377.
close_reason: Fixed: removed local const and replaced hardcoded 32 with WINDOW_SIZE
